| Born | (1980-05-26) 26 May 1980 (age 45)  [Karachi](/wiki/Karachi "Karachi"), [Pakistan](/wiki/Pakistan "Pakistan") |
| Other names | Usama |
| Occupation | Director |
| Parent | [Seema Ghazal](/wiki/Seema_Ghazal "Seema Ghazal") |

**Syed Ali Raza Usama** ([Urdu](/wiki/Urdu_language "Urdu language"): سید علی رضا اسامہ) is a [Pakistani](/wiki/Pakistani "Pakistani") television director,

A former creative director at [AAJ TV](/wiki/AAJ_TV "AAJ TV"), Usama has directed acclaimed drama serials such as *[Bashar Momin](/wiki/Bashar_Momin "Bashar Momin")* (2014) and *[Khuda Aur Muhabbat (season 2)](/wiki/Khuda_Aur_Mohabbat "Khuda Aur Mohabbat")* (2016-2017).[[1]](#cite_note-1)
